passive.name: Mark of the Kindred
passive.description: Kindred can mark targets to Hunt. Successfully completing a Hunt permanently empowers Kindred's basic abilities. Every 4 hunts completed also increases Kindred's basic attack range.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Both {{ci|Lamb}} and {{ci|Wolf}} mark targets to ''hunt''. Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against a ''hunted'' target collects a permanent stack of ''Mark of the Kindred''. '''Lamb''' can select an enemy {{tip|champion}} to ''hunt'', and '''Wolf''' automatically selects a large {{tip|monster}} to ''hunt''.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Mark of the Kindred:}} '''Lamb''' gains {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}} on her basic attacks and ''{{ai|Mounting Dread|Kindred}}''. For each stack, {{cis|Kindred}} abilities become more potent.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Innate:}} Both '''Lamb''' and '''Wolf''' mark targets to ''hunt''. Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against a ''hunted'' target collects a stack of ''Mark of the Kindred''.

{{sbc|Mark of the Kindred:}} '''Lamb''' gains {{pp|type=marks|75;100;125;150;175;200;225;250|4;7;10;13;16;19;22;25|formula=+75 at 4 stacks, and +25 every 3 stacks thereafter, up to 250 bonus range at 25 stacks.}} {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}} on her basic attacks and ''{{ai|Mounting Dread|Kindred}}''.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Lamb:}} '''Lamb''' is offered a selection of enemy {{tip|champions}} to ''hunt'' if she has not been [[combat status|in combat]] with them in the last 6 seconds. Once selected, the mark is applied after an 8-second delay and thereafter it can be collected by '''Kindred'''. '''Lamb''' gains the ability to select a new target every 75 seconds. ''Targets successfully hunted cannot be marked again for 4 minutes.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Takedown|Takedowns}} on {{tip|monsters}} occur if '''Kindred''' had damaged them within the last 6 seconds.
** This only includes if the monster was slain by '''Kindred''' or an ally.
* Only killing the large monster is required to claim '''Wolf's''' mark.
* Gaining stacks from champions that would change what constitutes as a valid target for '''Wolf''' will not affect '''Kindred's''' ability to claim '''Wolf's''' current target.
* '''Wolf''' cannot mark monsters that have been slain, even if '''Kindred's''' team doesn't know that the camp has been slain. 
* '''Wolf's''' cooldown is not displayed in-game. Combined with the above point and the target restrictions, '''Wolf''' may go extended periods of time without seeming to do anything. 
* '''Wolf's''' marked target will always have its mark removed from the map 15 seconds after dying for both teams, regardless of whether they have vision of it or not.

Q.name: Dance of Arrows
Q.description: Kindred tumbles and shoots up to three arrows at nearby targets.
Q.tooltip:
Kindred vaults, firing an arrow at up to 3 enemies, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage and gaining {{ totalqattackspeed }} Attack Speed for {{ e8 }} seconds.

While inside of Wolf's Frenzy, this Ability's Cooldown is reduced to {{ e4 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Lamb}} {{tip|dashes}} toward the target location, gaining {{sti|attack speed|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for a few seconds. She then fires at up to three nearby enemies, dealing {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: This cooldown is {{sti|cdr|reduced}} by casting ''{{ai|Wolf's Frenzy|Kindred}}'' or using ''Dance of Arrows'' within its area.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Lamb''' {{tip|dashes}} toward the target location, gaining {{sti|attack speed|{{as|35%|attack speed}}}} {{as|(+ 5% per {{ai|Mark of the Kindred|Kindred|mark}})|buzzword}} {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}} for 4 seconds and firing an arrow at up to 3 nearby {{tip|sight|visible}} enemies that deals {{as|physical damage}}. Her current attack target within any proximity will be prioritized by one of the arrows.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Dance of Arrows' '' {{sti|'''total''' cooldown}} is reduced to an amount while '''Lamb''' is within the area of ''{{ai|Wolf's Frenzy|Kindred}}''. Casting ''{{ai|Wolf's Frenzy|Kindred}}'' reduces ''Dance of Arrows' '' '''current''' cooldown to the same amount.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Dance of Arrows {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Lamb's''' basic attack timer. '''Lamb''' can cast any of her [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash. Dance of Arrows will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The dash distance can be extended to up to 400 units when dashing across terrain.
* The cooldown will not be modified if it cannot be reduced (the current cooldown would have to be less than the reduction amount in this case).

W.name: Wolf's Frenzy
W.description: Wolf enrages and attacks enemies around him.  Lamb passively gains stacks by moving and attacking. When fully charged, Lamb's next attack restores health.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Kindred gains stacks as they move and attack. At 100 stacks, Kindred's next Attack restores up to {{ attackheal }} Health based on their missing Health.

Active: Kindred claims a territory, ordering Wolf to bite at the last enemy Lamb Attacked. Wolf's bites deal {{ basewolfdamage }} plus {{ percentwolfdamage }} current Health magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} As {{ci|Kindred}} move and attack, they build up stacks of ''Hunter's Vigor''. At full stacks, {{cis|Lamb}} next basic attack {{tip|heals}} her.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Wolf}} {{tip|dashes}} to the target location and occupies the area for a period. He attacks enemies within the area, dealing {{as|magic damage}}. Against {{tip|monsters}}, '''Wolf's''' attacks deal increased damage and {{tip|slow}} the target for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb3: ''Wolf's Frenzy'' ends immediately if '''Lamb''' leaves the area or dies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} As '''Kindred''' move and attack, they build up to 100 stacks of ''Hunter's Vigor''. At maximum stacks, '''Lamb's''' next basic attack {{tip|heals}} her for {{as|{{pp|0 to 100 by 25|0 to 80|formula= 1.25% per 1% of '''Kindred's missing''' health. ''This is capped at 80% '''missing''' health.''|label1='''Missing''' health|type='''Kindred's''' '''missing''' health|label=Percent of level-scaling value|key=%|key1=%|changedisplay = true}}}} of {{pp|47 to 81}}. The heal is not triggered if '''Kindred''' is at full health.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Wolf''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target location, then claims the surrounding area as his territory for the next {{fd|8.5}} seconds, separating from '''Lamb'''. He automatically attacks the closest nearby {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy within the area, prioritizing the last enemy '''Lamb''' has attacked, then enemy champions, then non-champions.
wiki_detail.description3: '''Wolf's''' attacks deal {{as|magic damage}} and the rate at which he attacks scale with {{as|25% of '''Kindred's bonus''' attack speed}}. Against monsters, his attacks deal 150% damage and {{tip|slow}} the target by 50% for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|25 to 45}} {{as|(+ 20% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 20% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{fd|1.5}}% {{as|(+ 1% per {{ai|Mark of the Kindred|Kindred|mark}})|buzzword}} of target's '''current''' health)}}|Monster Damage|{{ap|25*1.5 to 45*1.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|20*1.5}}% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|20*1.5}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|1.5*1.5}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|1*1.5}}% per {{ai|Mark of the Kindred|Kindred|mark}})|buzzword}} of target's '''current''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Wolf's Frenzy'' ends immediately if '''Lamb''' leaves the area or dies.
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Wolf''' is {{tip|untargetable}} and {{tip|ghosted}} but he cannot move through terrain other than the initial dash on activation. 
* '''Wolf''' is not able to re-target {{ui|Rift Scuttler}} if he loses {{tip|sight}} of her while he's attacking it.
* ''Wolf's Frenzy'' does not end if '''Lamb''' enters {{tip|resurrection}}.
* ''Wolf's Frenzy'' applies ability haste to its cooldown post-effect.
** Given a base cooldown of 14 seconds at rank 5 with 100 ability haste, casting the ability and then ending it after 4 seconds will result in a remaining cooldown of <math>(14 - 4) \times 0.5 = 5</math> seconds, where 0.5 is [https://leagueoflegends.fandom.com/wiki/Haste#Formula derived from ability haste].
** Because of this, there will always be some cooldown time remaining post-effect regardless of the amount of ability haste, unlike certain other abilities with cooldowns that start on-cast.

E.name: Mounting Dread
E.description: Lamb fires a carefully placed shot, slowing the target. If Lamb attacks the target two more times, her third attack instead directs Wolf to pounce on the enemy, savaging them for massive damage.
E.tooltip:
Kindred weakens an enemy, Slowing them by {{ totalslow }}% for {{ slowduration }} second.

Kindred's third Attack against the target within {{ totalduration }} seconds of each other directs Wolf to pounce on the enemy, dealing an additional {{ basebitedamage }} plus {{ percentbitedamage }} missing Health physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Lamb}} fires a shot at the target enemy that briefly {{tip|slow|slows}} them applies a stack of ''Mounting Dread''. '''Lamb's''' basic attacks against this target stack ''Mounting Dread'' up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Applying maximum stacks consumes them all, causing {{ci|Wolf}} to pounce on the target and deal {{as| physical damage}} based on its {{as|'''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Lamb''' fires a shot at the target enemy that {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 30% {{as|(+ 5% per 100 AP)}} for 1 second and marks them for 4 seconds. Her basic attacks against the marked target each apply a [[stack]], refreshing the duration and stacking up to 3 times.
wiki_detail.description2: The third stack directs '''Wolf''' to pounce on the target, consuming all stacks to deal {{as|'''additional''' physical damage|physical damage}}, capped at 300 against {{tip|monster|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Additional Physical Damage|{{ap|80 to 200}} {{as|(+ 100% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 5% {{as|(+ {{fd|0.5}}% per {{ai|Mark of the Kindred|Kindred|Mark}})|buzzword}} of target's '''missing''' health)}}|Enhanced damage below threshold|{{ap|80 to 200}} {{as|(+ 100% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{tip|critical strike|icononly=true}} {{as|(+ {{fd|7.5}}% (+ {{ii|Infinity Edge|icononly=true}} 2%)|health}} {{as|(+ {{fd|0.75}}% (+ {{ii|Infinity Edge|icononly=true}} {{fd|0.2}}%) per {{ai|Mark of the Kindred|Kindred|Mark}})|buzzword}} {{as|of target's '''missing''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: The '''additional''' damage will {{tip|critically strike}} against targets below {{as|{{as|{{pp|type=critical strike chance|key=%|key1=%|25 to 75 for 11|0 to 100|formula=25% + 0.5% per 1% critical strike chance. ''This is capped at 100% critical strike chance.''}}|health}} of their {{sti|'''maximum''' health}}}}, increasing the {{as|'''missing''' health}} portion by {{as|{{critical damage|50|100}}|critical damage}}, and cannot {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} otherwise. The '''base''' damage of the pounce can independently {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}}.

R.name: Lamb's Respite
R.description: Lamb grants all living things inside a zone a respite from death. Until the effect ends, nothing can die. At the end, units are healed.
R.tooltip:
Kindred blesses the ground for {{ e2 }} seconds, allowing no unit, ally, enemy, or neutral to die while inside. Upon reaching 10% Health, units can't be damaged or healed while still inside the zone.

When the blessing ends, all units inside heal for {{ e1 }} Health.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Lamb}} blesses the ground under herself for a few seconds. Any unit inside the area will become {{tip|invulnerable}} upon reaching {{tip|minimum health threshold|low health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Units within the area are {{tip|heal|healed}} when the blessing ends.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Lamb''' blesses the ground under herself for 4 seconds and enters a {{rutngt|0.25}} [[Channel#Casting Times|cast time]]. '''All''' units inside the zone gain a {{tip|minimum health threshold}} of {{as|{{sti|health|10% of their '''maximum''' health}}}}, and will become {{tip|invulnerable}} for the remaining duration when they reach or are at the threshold, during which they also cannot be {{tip|heal|healed}}, but can still {{sti|health regeneration|regenerate health|link=health regeneration}}.
wiki_detail.description3: All targetable units within the zone are {{tip|heal|healed}} when the blessing ends.
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
* ''Lamb's Respite'' will affect all {{tip|champions}}, {{tip|minions}}, and {{tip|monsters}}, but not {{tip|ward|wards}}, {{tip|turret|turrets}}, or [[jungle plants]].
* ''Lamb's Respite'' will affect {{tip|untargetable}} units but does not grant them the {{tip|heal}} at the end of the blessing.
** It will specifically not affect champions that are {{tip|resurrection|resurrecting}} from {{ii|Guardian Angel}}.
* {{tip|Health resource|Health costs}} will ignore ''Lamb's Respite's'' threshold.
** The cost will not be paid if the caster is below the threshold.
* ''Lamb's Respite'' has no effect on {{tip|zombie state}} or {{tip|clone}} units.
* The effects are applied before the cast time.
